Returns controlled-drug sales lines for the facility and date range (not the per-medicine stock register). Optional query: `start_date`, `end_date` (defaults last 30 days). Organization context is required. For per-medicine stock movements use `GET /api/pharmacy/reports/controlled-drug-register/:facilityId/:medicineId`. Scope: optional headers `x-organization-id`/`x-org-id` and `x-facility-id`/`x-tenant-id` may be used by high-level roles to select a scope.

Stock movement ledger for one medicine at a facility; medicine must belong to the request organization. For period dispensing summary of all controlled drugs use `GET /api/pharmacy/reports/controlled-drugs/:facilityId`.

post.description: Creates a background export job (e.g. Excel). Body must include `type` and `format`; other fields mirror sync export query parameters. Requires facility context.

get.description: Returns the spreadsheet when the job status is completed.
